channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Multiple potholes, 12th May
item.description:
Why do you say they are repaired when they are not!!!! Cars swerving onto other side of street to avoid multiple potholes!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Gloucester Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 12th May
item.description:
NWD WITH 15 MINUTES DELAY BOARDS GIVE AND TAKE PLEASE CUT BACK OVERGROWN TREE BRANCHES OBSTRUCTION TO TRAFFIC LIGHTS APPROX 6 METERS X3 METERS HIGH (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On pavement, 12th May
item.description:
A representative from highways or contractor visied an existing report this morning. Marked the broken kerb with white paint and placed the broken bit of kerbing in the middle of rhe pavement so that anyone could trip over it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Treelands Close, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 12th May
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day carriage way pothole approx 1300x500x40mm tarmac parch number 1 (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 12th May
item.description:
Cw overgrown tree Obscuring street lght Needs cutting back Will need cherry picker Temp rd closure (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The footpath part is covered by the hedge and people are having to walk on the cycle path, 12th May
item.description:
Hedge is on the bend in the alley opposite the school

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Golden Vale, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are lots of brambles that are pushing against the fence by rear of 88 sandyleaze which is on sandyleaze playing fields, 12th May
item.description:
Email of 9/5/26 2012 hours - Please can you cut back the bramble as it is damaging the fence

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandyleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 12th May
item.description:
Pothole CW ENWD 620mm x 530mm x 73mm Road Closure TM Very Narrow Lane (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 12th May
item.description:
Pothole CW 620mm x 530mm x 73mm Road Closure TM Very Narrow Lane (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 12th May
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please lift and replace x1 broken sunken 450x450x20mm slabs number 1 (FW Broken Slabs)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 12th May
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please lift and relay x1 rocking 450x450x20mm slabs number 1 (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on bank of horsbere brook, 12th May
item.description:
Metal pole and wire fencing dumped on the bank of horsbere brook. There are also other smaller items and a lot of rubbish around the banks of the brook and in the brook itself. There is also a concrete post and slabs in the brook itself which was reported by someone in November 2025 and is still there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evergreen Walk, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Overgrown grass on main road , hedge severely overgrown. Blocking light into houses. Trees overgrown & overhanging blocking light, 12th May
item.description:
Outside houses on Pirton lane 58-62 & tress down side of 62
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58,60,62, Pirton Lane, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
